verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Some folks I know, by their name, Some I just known by their face, Some are known, by their fame, Others are known by their race. But in the kingdom of our Lord, Each soul has their place. And in my mind, I have no doubt, By names, we’ve been called out.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And we’ve been called out, For a purpose called out, To be a servant called out, To raise a standard He’s called you out To raise the banner called out, To be a witness called out, To show forgiveness called out, From the world, child you’ve been called out.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Within the prison, walls that day, The jailer had bound up their feet, Stripped up their garment, there they lay, Bleeding from where they were beaten But about midnight, all began to pray, Silently started to sing, The walls shook all, their bounds open wide, God said you’ve been called out.
